summary: Planning Board UI Restructuring - Frontend 100% PASS. All 5 main tabs (Dashboard, Packages, Material Vendors, Labour Contractors, RE Templates) working. Dashboard sub-tabs (All Projects, Requests, Rough Estimates, Payment Schedule) functional. Requests nested tabs (Site Eng Req, Materials, Labour Payment, Labour Stage, Open Req) present. Stage summary cards showing correct counts.

minor_warnings.issue: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop
minor_warnings.impact: No functional impact, cosmetic console warning only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning Board UI restructuring complete. Old tabs reorganized into: Dashboard (containing All Projects, Requests, Rough Estimates, Payment Schedule as sub-tabs) + Packages + Material Vendors (was Suppliers) + Labour Contractors (was Labours) + RE Templates. All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.

main_header_tabs.Dashboard: PASS - Opens by default, shows stage summary cards
main_header_tabs.Packages: PASS - Shows 2 packages with Add Package, search, edit/delete
main_header_tabs.Material Vendors: PASS - Shows 11 vendors with Add Vendor, search, edit/toggle
main_header_tabs.Labour Contractors: PASS - Shows contractor table with Add Contractor, search
main_header_tabs.RE Templates: PASS - Shows 5 templates with Create Template, search, edit/delete

dashboard_sub_tabs.All Projects: PASS - Shows project list with stage badges, New/Current/Delivered sub-tabs
dashboard_sub_tabs.Requests: PASS - Has 5 nested tabs (Site Eng Req, Materials, Labour Payment, Labour Stage, Open Req)
dashboard_sub_tabs.Rough Estimates: PASS - Shows RE projects with status cards (New Requests, In Progress, Awaiting Approval, Approved, Rejected)
dashboard_sub_tabs.Payment Schedule: PASS - Shows month navigation, Add Stages button, schedule table

all_projects_sub_tab.New Projects: PASS - Shows 6 new projects with Ready to Construction button
all_projects_sub_tab.Stage badges: PASS - Shows Yet To Start, Plinth, etc.
all_projects_sub_tab.Status badges: PASS - Shows pending payment, planning, in planning, draft

features_tested.no_console_errors: PASS - No JavaScript errors, only minor React key warning
